query: /nerdbot derive ./knowledge-base export a concise architecture brief from wiki/topics/agent-patterns.md into derived/agent-patterns-brief.md
expected_behavior: Agent dispatches to the Derive workflow based on the explicit '/nerdbot derive' invocation
Agent confirms the canonical inputs and the target output path before generating the artifact
Agent writes the result to a non-canonical output path such as derived/ or exports/ instead of replacing wiki or raw content
Agent records the recipe or regeneration path so the derived output is reproducible
Agent keeps the derived output explicitly non-canonical and linked back to the KB inputs
Agent appends an activity-log entry with the inputs, output path, and rollback or regeneration notes
